intro: Transform chaos into comfort in a meditative interior design simulator where every item tells a story!
description:
In Unbox the Room, you’re not just moving furniture — you’re a professional life-arranger, a master of the “where does this go?” mystery, and a total (consensual) snoop. From cramped studio apartments to luxurious mansions, it’s up to you to transform a pile of cardboard boxes into a beautifully organized and lived-in home.

KEY FEATURES: 
- The Ultimate Zen Zone: No timers. No "Game Over" screens. Just the rhythmic thwack of tape peeling and the pure, dopamine-hitting click of a book fitting perfectly onto a shelf.
- Environmental Storytelling: Why does this guy have four different toilets? What’s the deal with that strange book at the bottom of the box? Piece together your clients' lives through the junk they refuse to throw away.
- Total Aesthetic Control: Not feeling the beige? Use the Magic Paint Roller to overhaul the room's vibe. Make it goth. Make it neon. Make it a nightmare. We won't tell the client.
- Sandbox Shenanigans: Done with the story? Head to the Creative Sandbox where the budget is infinite and the boxes are non-existent. Build the dream gaming den you’ll never actually afford in real life!
- Tactile Satisfaction: Every item has been crafted with gorgeous pixel art and satisfying physics.
